sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74490" key="o)pisqo/mhron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπισθό-μηρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n74490.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the back of the thigh,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.5</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
